title: Trump-Xi summit: What's on the table for US, Chinese companies

title: Nvidia’s Huang Wants to Sell Chips to China. Trump Has Other Priorities.
summary: Nvidia  CEO Jensen Huang won’t be among the business leaders accompanying President Donald Trump on this week’s visit to China, according to media reports. The recent strength of the semiconductor sector has been a boon for Nvidia, as investors warm again to the prospects for its artificial-intelligence chips.
